constraints: Runtime wrappers must stay thin and point to canonical .ai/assets/skills specs.
Do not move metadata unless all references are updated.
non_goals: Do not change canonical ddd-ca-hex-architect skill behavior.

review_findings: Runtime wrappers are healthy, but ddd-ca-hex-architect/agents/openai.yaml may be mistaken for canonical skill content.

steps: Check whether openai.yaml is referenced by runtime tooling or docs.
Add explicit runtime-metadata labeling or move it only if references are clear.

deferred_items: This task can be skipped if no ambiguity remains after higher-priority remediation.
